name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: Fort Worth, TX ACE Cash Express at 4201 E Berry St offers fast payday and title loans with same-day funding.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express at 4201 E Berry St Ste 22 is a standalone payday and title loan storefront in Fort Worth, TX. Located in the East Berry Street corridor, this branch serves the surrounding neighborhood with convenient weekday and Saturday hours. The location opens Monday through Friday at 9:00 AM, closing at 6:00 PM, and operates Saturday 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM for customers who need flexible access to funds.

This Fort Worth ACE Cash Express location specializes in payday loans, title loans, and emergency cash advances. If you need to discuss your borrowing options or get approved for a quick loan, call (817) 535-8351 during business hours. The staff at this East Berry location can walk you through the application process and answer questions about fees, repayment terms, and the documents you'll need to bring.

Residents and workers throughout Fort Worth, TX who face unexpected expenses often visit ACE for quick approval and same-day funding. Bring your valid government ID, proof of income, and proof of residency to speed up the application. This branch is your neighborhood option when you need cash fast—no credit check required for most loans.
address: 4201 E Berry St Ste 22, Fort Worth, TX 76105

pricing.guarantee_details: No money-back guarantee found for financial services. Some states require a loan rescission period by law — check state-specific terms.

pros: Operating since 1968 — one of the longest-tenured non-bank financial services chains in the U.S.
700+ physical store locations nationwide with same-day in-store service availability
A+ BBB rating with accreditation under the Payday Loans category (Irving, TX headquarters)
Flare Account prepaid debit card offers up to 6.00% APY on optional savings — well above typical prepaid product rates
Offers 13+ service types in a single location: loans, check cashing, bill pay, money transfers, tax prep, and more
Both in-store and online loan applications available, with no bank account required for many services
Check cashing accepted for payroll, government, tax refund, and personal checks — useful for unbanked consumers
cons: Payday loans carry state-regulated but typically triple-digit APRs — among the most expensive short-term borrowing options available
Subject to a CFPB enforcement action against parent company Populus Financial Group, Inc. — a notable regulatory compliance concern
Fees for check cashing and services are not published at a uniform national rate and must be confirmed at each store location
Loan availability, amounts, and terms vary significantly by state — there is no consistent national product offering
Products generally do not report to credit bureaus, making ACE services ineffective for building or improving credit
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers needing immediate cash before their next payday with no bank account required
Individuals who need to cash a payroll, government, or tax refund check without a bank relationship
People needing to pay bills, send money internationally, or buy money orders in a single retail location
Consumers in areas without local bank branches who need in-person financial services access
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best suited for unbanked or underbanked consumers who need immediate cash, check cashing, or basic financial services without a traditional bank account — particularly those who value in-person service at one of 700+ locations. The main caveat is cost: payday loans are among the most expensive borrowing options available, and the company's CFPB enforcement history warrants consumer awareness before borrowing.
services: Payday loans / cash advances (short-term, due by next payday)
Check cashing — payroll, government, personal, and tax refund checks
Money transfers (domestic and international via MoneyGram)
Prepaid debit cards (Flare Account with up to 6.00% APY savings option)
Tax preparation (via ACE Tax Program partner network)
meta_description: ACE Cash Express at 4201 E Berry St Ste 22, Fort Worth, TX. Fast payday and title loans with same-day funding.
